description: Initialized manuscript metadata and KnowledgeVault link from the proposal note.
Read the proposal, related syntheses, paper notes, package docs, and replication assets.
Updated the source packet, paper plan, paper map, task board, workplan, formal-object registry, citation provenance, literature search, replication plan, draft skeleton, bibliography, and logs.
Created the matching GitHub milestone.
Removed the two template-repository milestone manifests from manuscript/transparency/milestones.
Removed the matching template-era entries from timeline.json, user-input.jsonl, and agent-actions.jsonl.
Reread updated KnowledgeVault notes on Bonhomme-Robin noisy ICA and BR-style SVAR moment inversion.
Updated the source packet, paper plan, paper map, task board, workplan, formal registry, provenance, literature search, replication README, draft skeleton, and logs.
Added detailed analytic derivation, simulation verification, and adversarial review tasks before BR-style claims can be promoted.
Created the matching GitHub milestone.
Verified the M0005 transparency manifest, local tag, HEAD, origin/main, and GitHub milestone state.
Updated the project dashboard, task board, session log, and Codex log so M21 is done and M05 is the next substantive task.
Created and closed the matching GitHub issue milestone for M0006.
Created manuscript/derivations/bivariate-cumulant-map.md with the multilinear cumulant formula and all distinct second-, third-, and fourth-order cumulant equations.
Classified clean mixed cumulants separately from pure own nuisance noise cumulants and recorded profiled nuisance maps for nu_i, tau_i, and rho_i.
Updated the task board, dashboard, workplan, formal-object registry, session log, Codex log, and matching GitHub milestone.
Independently enumerated all second-, third-, and fourth-order bivariate cumulant coefficients for B(a,b).
Recorded the M06 audit in review-log.md and in the derivation note, including the correction that clean third mixed cumulants are not identifying restrictions after unrestricted gamma profiling.
Updated the formal-object registry, dashboard, task board, workplan, session log, Codex log, and matching GitHub milestone.
Created manuscript/derivations/br-applicability.md showing why direct all-kurtotic Bonhomme-Robin quasi-JADE fails when independent bivariate errors give J=1<K=2.
Documented that the skewness route also does not cover the two-factor L=2 case and separated what the BR analogy justifies from what it does not.
Updated the formal-object registry, dashboard, task board, workplan, paper map, review log, session log, Codex log, and matching GitHub milestone.
Created manuscript/derivations/dw-noise-robust-moments.md with the noisy DW system, robust higher-cumulant moment stack, second-moment failure, bivariate local-rank derivation, and efficiency caveat.
Updated the formal registry, paper plan, paper map, dashboard, task board, workplan, and logs to mark the route as a working derivation pending adversarial audit.

Rewrote the paper plan, paper map, draft skeleton, source packet, dashboard, task board, workplan, registry, citation provenance, literature search, and replication plan around noisy sign-set bias, standard DW false sharpening, robust DW higher moments, and Monte Carlo comparison evidence.
Removed old constructive-route references from active planning files, the robust-DW derivation note, and the active bibliography snapshot.
Selected M24 as the next task from the updated paper plan and task board.
Audited the robust DW derivation for cumulant algebra, fourth-cumulant covariance subtractions, second-moment exclusion, normalization, local rank, Gaussian-noise assumptions, and bias language.
Updated the derivation note, review log, formal registry, source packet, dashboard, task board, workplan, decision log, session log, and Codex log.
Recorded the user scope and evidence-sequencing notes in manuscript logs and planning surfaces.
Updated the paper plan, paper map, dashboard, task board, workplan, source packet, replication plan, draft notes, and formal registry.
Created manuscript/derivations/standard-dw-j-test-under-noise.md with the M25 working derivation for standard-DW J-test inversion under residual noise.
Created manuscript-local triage script, Markdown summary, JSON output, and updated manuscript status/logs.
Created M30 audit note, added structural-coordinate noise diagnostics and anisotropic stress case to M35, reran the triage output, and updated manuscript status/logs.
Created a manuscript-local figure script, rendered PNG, and explanatory simulation note.
Updated figure, simulation, registry, dashboard, task-board, source-packet, review, and log surfaces to mark the figure as exploratory evidence.
Created the corrected 3-by-3 sign/covariance, standard-DW, and robust-DW grid figure script and PNG.
Updated figure notes, registry, dashboard, task board, source packet, review, decision, session, Codex, and transparency logs to mark the N-test cutoff correction.
Created the companion sign/covariance, standard-DW, and robust-DW grid figure script and PNG.
Updated figure notes, registry, dashboard, task board, source packet, review, decision, session, Codex, and transparency logs to record the weak-higher-moment limitation.
Replaced the noise-grid profiled covariance-plus-cumulant robust row with a pure higher-cumulant population score.
Aligned the non-Gaussianity companion population cumulants with the standardized chi-square(5) shock design and kept the Gaussian column as the full admissible graph.
Regenerated fig_sign_dw_robust_noise_grid.png and fig_sign_dw_robust_nongaussianity_grid.png and updated figure notes, registry, dashboard, task board, and logs.
